caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is positioned in front of a solid black background, speaking directly toward the camera. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring a decorative embroidered collar and a small dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a small logo accompanies the text "NPTEL". As she speaks, her facial expressions shift slightly, with her mouth opening and closing to form words and her eyes blinking. The woman remains centered in the frame, maintaining a consistent pose and position throughout the sequence, while the lighting and setting remain static.
